**What & why**

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue (Fixes #N). -->

**Scope check** (these public repos are the open interop boundary — the product backend is private):

- [ ] This changes published artifacts, docs, or tooling **in this repo** — not OpenDPP product
      behaviour. A conformance gap belongs in
      [`opendpp-interop`](https://github.com/OpenDPP/opendpp-interop) as a *Conformance gap* issue.
- [ ] Any samples or outputs remain faithful, reproducible outputs of the live service.
- [ ] No secrets or private keys added (CI also runs a secret scan).
